title: Prevent containers not in pods from depending on containers in pods
body: Containers in pods cannot depend on containers outside of the same pod. Make the reverse true as well - containers not in pods cannot depend on containers in pods. This greatly simplifies our dependency handling, as we can guarantee that removing a pod will not encounter dependency issues.

comments.body: Sig-proxy tests seem broken after kube revendor. Looking into it.
Tests are green locally, so this looks like just an issue on papr (and potentially travis)
I was hoping that unvendoring kube PR solved the test issues, but evidently not.
Changes LGTM, but Travis isn't happy with you here too.
